name: Ayesha Khan
bio: Soulful ghazal singer blending tradition with modern rhythm. Ayesha has performed at over 50 venues across India, weaving classical Urdu poetry with contemporary arrangements. Her voice carries the weight of tradition while pushing boundaries into fusion territory.
collab_interests: Looking for producers who can blend electronic beats with classical ragas. Open to cross-genre experiments with hip-hop artists.

name: Riaz Ansari
bio: Spoken word & conscious rap. Riaz brings raw stories from Delhi's streets to the stage, blending Hindi and English with hard-hitting social commentary. A regular at underground cyphers and poetry slams.
collab_interests: Seeking producers for an upcoming EP. Interested in collaborating with ghazal artists for a fusion project.

name: Naina Verma
bio: Acoustic singer-songwriter with melodic hooks that stay with you. Naina's indie folk sound blends English and Kannada lyrics over fingerpicked guitar, creating intimate soundscapes inspired by everyday life.
collab_interests: Open to duets and co-writing sessions. Looking for a tabla player or percussionist to add depth to live sets.

name: Karan "K-Beat" Singh
bio: Trap/R&B producer open for collabs. K-Beat has produced tracks for several underground hip-hop artists across India. His beats blend 808s with Indian classical samples, creating a unique sonic identity.
collab_interests: Always looking for vocalists — rappers and singers alike. Send me your demos!

name: Farah Qureshi
bio: Classical ghazal performer with contemporary arrangements. Farah trained under Ustad Nusrat Ali for 8 years and now brings a fresh perspective to traditional ghazals, incorporating subtle electronic and world music elements.
collab_interests: Interested in recording collaborations with string quartets and electronic producers. Currently working on an album.

name: Sameer Rao
bio: Underground emcee and freestyle cypher regular. Sameer is known for his rapid-fire delivery and witty wordplay. A mainstay of Pune's hip-hop scene, he organizes monthly cypher events and mentors upcoming rappers.
collab_interests: Down for any cypher or freestyle session. Looking for producers who understand boom-bap aesthetics.
